message:
feat(pwd/grp): add deterministic cache fingerprinting and parse stats

ABI layer (pwd_abi.rs, grp_abi.rs): Implement FileFingerprint
(len + modified_ns) for deterministic file-change detection.
Add per-operation cache metrics tracking hits/misses/reloads/
invalidations. Refactor cache loading to refresh_cache() with
explicit invalidation policy. Add generation counters
(cache_generation, entries_generation) to detect stale parsed
entries and trigger rebuild_entries() on mismatch. Comprehensive
unit tests for cache behavior.

Core layer (pwd/mod.rs, grp/mod.rs): Introduce ParseStats struct
(total_lines, parsed_entries, malformed_lines, skipped_lines) for
deterministic parsing audit trails. Add parse_all_with_stats()
and refactor parse_all() to delegate to it. Unit tests validate
malformed line counting and trailing newline handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
